verdict: Aveeno's skin relief lotion replicates the brand's signature oatmeal approach with glycerin hydration. Functional for sensitive skin but formulaically similar to their daily moisturizing lotion with minimal differentiation.

_research.name: Aveeno Skin Relief Lotion
pros: Lightweight absorption suitable for body use
_research.con: Nearly identical formulation to their standard daily moisturizer with minimal added value.
